FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Find quick answers to common questions and learn how Bokli helps simplify booking management for your business.

items.a: Yes. You can create your account, set up your services, and start accepting bookings with the free plan. You can upgrade anytime.
Yes. Bokli supports online payments through integrated payment gateways (available in premium plans depending on your region).

items.q: Can I link my mini-website to my own domain?
items.a: Yes. You can connect your custom domain to your Bokli mini-website so customers can book through your branded URL.

items.q: Will Bokli work for my shop or local business?
items.a: Absolutely. Bokli works for salons, clinics, tutors, workshops, fitness centers, and any business that takes bookings.
No. Customers can book instantly without creating an account. You still get full customer information for follow-ups.
Yes. Multi-branch support is available in premium plans, allowing you to manage staff and schedules across locations.

items.q: What do I need to get started?
items.a: Just sign up, add your services and working hours, and share your booking link. Bokli handles the rest automatically.

items.q: Can I manage everything from my mobile phone?
items.a: Yes. Bokli is fully responsive and works smoothly on mobile, so you can manage bookings, staff, and payments anytime.
